# Ghulam Mohiuddin - AI Engineer & Senior iOS Developer

> AI Engineer & Senior iOS Developer with 4+ years of experience building intelligent systems, production iOS apps, and full-stack solutions with Python, PyTorch, LangChain, Swift & SwiftUI.

## About
Ghulam Mohiuddin is an AI Engineer & Senior iOS Developer based in Lahore, Pakistan, currently working at iParagons Tech. He is pivoting from iOS engineering to AI engineering, bringing deep mobile expertise to the world of intelligent systems. He specializes in Python, PyTorch, TensorFlow, LangChain, RAG pipelines, LLMs, as well as Swift, SwiftUI, and modern iOS frameworks including SceneKit, RealityKit, and In-App Purchases. He has extensive experience building full-stack solutions with FastAPI, Supabase, and Firebase.

## Skills
Python, PyTorch, TensorFlow, LangChain, RAG, LLMs, Prompt Engineering, Hugging Face, Vector Databases, Swift, SwiftUI, Objective-C, UIKit, Combine, CoreData, SwiftData, ARKit, RealityKit, SceneKit, CoreML, WidgetKit, In-App Purchases, REST APIs, FastAPI, Firebase, Supabase, Docker, PostgreSQL, Git, Xcode, MVVM, Clean Architecture

## Experience
- **AI Engineer & Senior iOS Developer** at iParagons Tech (2021 - Present)
  - Building intelligent systems with Python, PyTorch, LangChain, and RAG pipelines
  - Expert in Swift, SwiftUI, Combine, SceneKit, RealityKit, SiriKit, WidgetKit
  - Built production apps with In-App Purchases, backend integrations, and AI features

## Featured Projects

### Invoza - Invoice & Estimate Maker
A professional invoicing and estimates app with beautiful UI, PDF generation, multi-currency support, and cloud sync.
Technologies: Swift, SwiftUI, CoreData, PDFKit, CloudKit, StoreKit, In-App Purchases, MVVM
App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/invoza-invoice-maker/id6756181651

### Leaf - Social Calendar App
Redesigned and modernized a legacy UIKit app into SwiftUI with AI-powered text understanding using OpenAI.
Technologies: Swift, SwiftUI, UIKit, OpenAI, MVVM, Parse, Firebase, SPM

### AI Smart Reminder
An intelligent reminder app powered by AI with natural language task creation using OpenAI.
Technologies: Swift, SwiftUI, OpenAI, In-App Purchases, WidgetKit, SiriKit, Action Button
App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/ai-smart-reminder/id6747449550

### MultiRoom
Advanced room scanning using Apple's RoomPlan API with SceneKit & RealityKit 3D visualizations.
Technologies: Swift, SwiftUI, RoomPlan, SceneKit, RealityKit, ARKit, MVVM

### Mimic.me
AI-powered image generation app using Stable Diffusion with advanced prompt engineering.
Technologies: Swift, SwiftUI, Stable Diffusion, Firebase, RunPod
App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/mimic-me/id6480029254

### PureMetric
A comprehensive nutrition tracking app with detailed macro analysis and daily reports.
Technologies: Swift, SwiftUI, SwiftData, Charts, MVVM

### Sly AI - Prank Photos & Videos
An AI-powered prank content generator using Gemini for creating photos and videos.
Technologies: Swift, SwiftUI, Gemini, MVVM, FastAPI, Python, Supabase
App Store: https://apps.apple.com/pk/app/sly-ai-prank-photos-videos/id6757885307

### DarkFinder
A powerful OSINT search tool with AI-powered analysis for finding publicly available information.
Technologies: Swift, SwiftUI, REST APIs, Gemini, Firebase, MVVM, NodeJS
